spoken: Hundreds of elements on a live eBay search page. Every button, every link, every filter. The sieve found them all. No LLM. No vision model. Zero tokens.
Nav dot sign-in is clickable. Nav dot deals is clickable. Nav dot cart is clickable. Structured. Deterministic. Named.
Now a state park reservation system. Completely different site. Live.
Over a hundred elements. Park info, login controls, navigation, share buttons. All detected instantly.
Banner dot park-title is readable. Nav dot login-button is clickable. Banner dot directions-button is clickable. Every element named.
The sieve sees everything. The glossary names everything. The agent knows everything. LeftGlove plus OpenClaw. Deterministic page understanding for AI agents.
